overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character leading a lantern-equipped horse along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. The scene transitions from calm nocturnal traversal to a brief wildlife encounter where deer emerge from the darkness, causing the horse to spook and rear before continuing onward.

agents.ego_description: leading a horse along a narrow dirt path through rolling grasslands, holding the reins while the horse's side-lantern illuminates the trail ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, equipped with a lit lantern on its saddle

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
rolling hills covered in tall green grass
sparse deciduous trees dotting the landscape
sparse deciduous trees dotting the landscape
large boulders visible in the distance among the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night, leading a horse with a glowing lantern. The landscape features rolling hills of tall grass with scattered trees silhouetted against the starry sky, creating a serene nocturnal atmosphere.

events.description: group of deer emerge from the tall grass on the right side of the path
horse gets spooked by the deer, rears up on its hind legs and turns away

agents.ego_description: holding the reins firmly as the horse reacts to the deer, then calming the animal and continuing forward

notable_agents.action: deer standing in the grass beside the trail, triggering the horse's flight response
horse rearing up and turning away from the deer before settling down

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the trail, deer suddenly appear in the grass to the right. The horse spooks and rears up, forcing the character to pause and calm the animal before proceeding. The landscape remains consistent with open grasslands and scattered trees under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene nocturnal grassland that shifts from a steady journey into a moment of sudden wildlife tension. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail, leading a horse equipped with a glowing lantern that illuminates the rolling hills and tall grass beneath a starry sky. As the traversal continues, the peaceful atmosphere is interrupted when deer suddenly emerge from the darkness in the grass to the right. This encounter causes the horse to spook and rear up, forcing the character to pause and calm the animal. The scene then settles back into its quiet rhythm as the character resumes their path through the silhouetted trees and open fields.
